title: rosa × nitidula var. scabrata
intro: Rosa × nitidula var. scabrata, also known as the Rosa nitida, is a type of fragrant rose hybrid that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The Rosa × nitidula var. scabrata plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Rosa × nitidula var. scabrata include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
